CC3PO

Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 2026

Our Promise

Don't Lose Your Way exists because privacy matters — especially when people are sharing their most vulnerable feelings. This policy explains how we handle your information with the care it deserves.

What We Collect

  • Feelings & Chapel Submissions: When you write in the Chapel, we process your text to create lyrics or music (if you choose). Private submissions are not stored long-term.
  • Contact Form Data: If you contact us through the Partners page, we collect your name, email, and message.
  • Analytics: We use privacy-first analytics (Plausible) that do not use cookies or track individuals.

What We Do NOT Do

  • We do not sell your personal information
  • We do not use tracking cookies
  • We do not share your feelings with third parties without your consent
  • We do not use your content for AI training beyond the immediate Chapel experience
  • We do not require account creation or login

AI Processing

When you use the Chapel feature, your text is processed by AI to generate creative content (lyrics, music). This processing happens in real-time and is not stored unless you explicitly choose to share it.

Data Retention

Private Chapel submissions are not stored long-term. Shared submissions are retained until you request removal. Contact form data is retained for partnership purposes only.

Your Rights

  • Request deletion of any content you've shared
  • Opt out of any data collection
  • Contact us with privacy concerns at any time

Third-Party Services

This site is hosted on Netlify and uses Cloudflare for security and performance. These services have their own privacy policies, but we do not share your personal information with them beyond what is necessary to operate the site.

Contact

For privacy questions or data requests, visit our contact page.

If you are in crisis, please call or text 988.

Stay.

About Disclaimer Terms Privacy Policy AI Disclosure Crisis Protocol Crisis: 988

This site is intended for individuals 13 and older.

This space exists for people who almost gave up — and stayed.

If you're in immediate distress or thinking about harming yourself, please reach out now.

Call or text 988 — 24/7 • Free • Confidential
